race.comment: Big field with plenty of chances. CITY GOLD SPEED (7) had excuses from the wide draw two-back, then raced on the speed with a gritty second in the heavy (10) going over 1262m at Taree. Can get the better of these today on a firmer deck. RING MY BELL (14) fourth-up for this after she floundered in the heavy going with a dismal last over 1100m at Dubbo. Solid effort at Scone two-back and nicely placed to bounce back. ZOUSANITY (8) started a dominant fav on resumption with a comfortable Maiden victory over 1200m at Tamworth in a Super Mdn. Confidence is high and can go on with it now. EPHEMERAL (9) has had a freshen-up since winning over 1200m at Tamworth last start. Has trialled well subsequently and can feature here.
